title: What Leading Like Christ Actually Looks Like (It's Not What You Think)
caption:
Leadership isn't authority. It's cost.

Most men think leading means being in charge. But the Christ pattern is something else entirely: first to apologize, first to serve, first to absorb the hit.

Jesus picked up the basin when He could have commanded anything. At His trial He said almost nothing. He went to the cross before anyone asked Him to. That's what going first actually looks like.

The man who earns the room is the man who served it first. The loudest voice in the room is usually the most insecure one.

Save this. Share it with a man who leads.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #scripture #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #christianity #theethosapp
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
